# Calendario Mapa (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: x8q-5zk-wzx.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/map/gb/city/london
2. Click on date picker in the search bar
3. Expand calendar navigation
4. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
5. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
6. Select date 1 in the first month
7. Select date 2 in the first month
8. Click to the search button
10. Select date 4 from calendar
11. Select date 2 from calendar
12. Click Buscar button to search
